nasb.text: Outside the veil of testimony in the tent of meeting, Aaron shall keep it in order from evening to morning before the Lord continually; it shall be a perpetual statute throughout your generations.

esv.text: Outside the veil of the testimony, in the tent of meeting, Aaron shall arrange it from evening to morning before the Lord regularly. It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.

cnv.text: 在會幕中法櫃的幔子外，亞倫要使這燈在耶和華面前通宵達旦地長燃；這是你們世世代代永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 在会幕遮掩约柜的幔子外，亚伦要负责照看灯，使灯从晚上到早晨一直亮着。这是你们世世代代都要遵守的律例。
